name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0003
purpose: Stage the runtime library closure for MixtarRVS Toolkit and fallback network/remote-access services without replacing /lib, /usr/lib, PID 1, OpenRC, SSH, or boot defaults.
non_goals: Do not disable OpenRC, SSH, iwd, dhcpcd, dbus, or apk.
known_limitations: Current MixtarRVS ELF interpreters still point at /lib/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1.
The staged loader is a closure artifact, not active boot/runtime ownership.
Initramfs/rootfs construction must later decide how the loader path is owned by MixtarRVS while preserving fallback boot.
